fault_hypothesis: Line 29 simply floors each share with int(), discarding fractional remainders without applying a largest-remainder correction, so the sum of integer allocations can be less than total.

constraints.intent: After flooring, the sum of integer allocations must equal total.
Inside the floor_to_int branch, the returned list must sum to total.

spec.expr: all(s >= minimum for s in shares__1)

constraints.intent: Every accumulated share must be at least minimum after each iteration.
Immediately after initialisation shares must be empty before the loop fills it.
